response.global_analysis: 1. Voice Audio Match: Excellent match between the vocal track and the transcribed English/Japanese terms. 2. Special Terms: Captured Japanglish slang ('I wakaru' for 'I understand') and server-specific plugins ('NeFoLaBo' stock name). 3. Timing: Precisely synchronized timestamps to the streamer's commentary and reactive exclamations, keeping durations tight. Fixed a typo in the timestamp at 01:03.500 -> 01:05.100.

subtitles.original: Do I need one more... row?
subtitles.english: Do I need one more... row?

subtitles.original: Like this, and then the pumpkins will grow.
subtitles.english: Like this, and then the pumpkins will grow.

subtitles.original: Sorry, I was never really... a pumpkin farmer.
subtitles.english: Sorry, I was never really... a pumpkin farmer.

subtitles.original: And then I would need two this way if I go like this.
subtitles.english: And then I would need two this way if I go like this.

subtitles.original: So then I would place one here...
subtitles.english: So then I would place one here...

subtitles.original: One, two, three, four, five, six, seven, eight, nine, 10, 11, 12, 13, 14.
subtitles.english: One, two, three, four, five, six, seven, eight, nine, 10, 11, 12, 13, 14.

subtitles.original: No need to till for pumpkins? But I want to.
subtitles.english: No need to till for pumpkins? But I want to.

subtitles.original: It just... It just feels nice, you know?
subtitles.english: It just... It just feels nice, you know?

subtitles.original: The pumpkins! They're growing! They're growing!
subtitles.english: The pumpkins! They're growing! They're growing!

subtitles.original: Oh no, everything is falling in price.
subtitles.english: Oh no, everything is falling in price.

subtitles.original: It's time to buy, buy, buy!
subtitles.english: It's time to buy, buy, buy!

subtitles.original: What am I going to do with all these carrots?
subtitles.english: What am I going to do with all these carrots?

subtitles.original: Oh, this is time to buy NeFoLaBo.
subtitles.english: Oh, this is time to buy NeFoLaBo.

subtitles.original: Make another double chest for all the food.
subtitles.english: Make another double chest for all the food.

subtitles.original: I shall put the food chest up top.
subtitles.english: I shall put the food chest up top.

subtitles.original: I forgot. You can't open chests like that.
subtitles.english: I forgot. You can't open chests like that.
